title: ibidium cernuum var. ochroleucum
intro: Ibidium cernuum var. ochroleucum, also known as the yellow-flowered ibidium, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which can help to heal wounds, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ibidium cernuum var. ochroleucum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
